sheet.concept: A ghostly enhanced hero who phases between the living world and Limbo/Purgatory, slipping through walls, avoiding harm, and speaking with spirits of the dead.
sheet.backstory: Eddie Swazey became Wraith after the Pulse changed his body into something partially out of phase with the physical world. His powers make him an infiltrator, protector, and uneasy bridge between the living and the dead.
sheet.specialties:
Stealth and infiltration
Reading emotions and motives
Spotting danger and surveillance details
Driving and vehicle handling
Spirit communication and death-related occult clues
sheet.originTalent:
Adaptive Biology 1 - Instinctive Phasing Control: Once per encounter, when using an At-Will Phasing power, ignore Disadvantage from stress, pain, or unstable conditions on that power use.
Built-In Merit: Altered Physiology 1 - Unusual Senses - Phase Senses.
Built-In Flaw: Marked by Change 1 - Ghostly EMF.
sheet.classFeatures:
Level 1: Inner Fortress
Level 1: Force of Will
sheet.startingTalent: Psychic Discipline 1: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saves against psychic intrusion, mind reading, emotional control, mental domination, and psychic damage effects. Once per encounter, when you succeed on such a save, identify the direction or emotional signature of the source if within range.
sheet.talents:
Adaptive Biology 1 - Instinctive Phasing Control
Psychic Discipline 1
sheet.merits:
Altered Physiology 1 - Unusual Senses - Phase Senses: Gain Advantage on Perception checks tied to phase senses.
Base of Operations 1: A modest safehouse, garage, apartment, backroom, small lab, or hidden bunker.
Cash Flow 1: Comfortable reliable income/support.
sheet.flaws:
Marked by Change 1 - Ghostly EMF: Wraith emits a strong EMF signature detectable by technology or beings that can sense electromagnetic frequencies.
Honest to a Fault 1: Disadvantage on Influence checks involving direct lies or deliberate misdirection.
Responsibility to the Innocent 1: Cannot ignore civilian danger when aware of it.
Limitation - Solid Ground Required: Cannot phase through floors or ground-level surfaces; can pass through walls, ceilings, and vertical barriers but needs solid ground beneath his feet.
Limitation - Limbo/Purgatory Phase State: While phased, he exists partly in Limbo/Purgatory and cannot pass through beings or obstacles there; phased beings and Limbo/Purgatory sources affect him normally.
sheet.minorTrigger: Use phasing to protect or rescue someone who cannot protect themselves.
sheet.majorTrigger: Enter danger alone by phasing through a barrier, wall, or hostile space so allies or civilians can escape.
sheet.definingTrigger: Suffer a major loss, defeat, or injury because you refused to abandon innocent people or trapped spirits.
sheet.powerSet1Notes:
PHASING 1 - Power Effect Value: 15
Passive Benefits: Selectively phase individual limbs, whole body, or objects in contact with you. Fully phased, physical attacks cannot target you; you cannot interact with physical objects and pass through solid matter at normal speed.
Phase Through (Tier 1 At-Will, Bonus Action): Move up to Close range (25 ft) through solid matter without provoking Reactions. Must end in open space.
Disruptive Phase (Tier 1 Encounter, Action): Close range. Attack 1d20 + CON + Rank Bonus vs Parry/Block. Hit: 2d8 + CON physical damage bypassing armor and worn equipment. Target rolls 1d20 + CON vs EV 15. Failure: Dazed until end of next turn. Success: Shaken until end of next turn.
Walk Through Walls 1 (Utility): Outside combat, phase through solid barriers of any thickness at normal speed while carrying worn/held items.
Phase Slip 1 (Utility): Free action once per Turn, extend phased state to one object carried or worn.
sheet.powerSet2Notes:
INVISIBILITY 1 (General Utility)
As an Action, turn invisible until the end of your next Turn. While invisible, you gain Hidden: attacks against you have Disadvantage and your attacks have Advantage. Hidden ends if you attack, use a visible power, or take damage. Sound and scent can still reveal you.
Enhancement: Sound is muffled and distorted while active.
Enhancement: Sustainable Power - may be maintained with a Bonus Action each turn.
sheet.powerSet3Notes:
SPIRIT SPEECH 1 (General Utility)
You can perceive and briefly communicate with spirits of the recently dead if they died within the last week and their remains, a significant possession, or death location is within Short range. Willing spirits communicate for up to one minute. With one minute at a corpse or death location, experience the subject’s final moments. Advantage on Occult checks related to death and spiritual activity.
Enhancements: Automatically senses spirits nearby; extended duration for willing spirits to one scene; can communicate with spirits that refused to cross over after one week and remain in Limbo/Purgatory.
sheet.costume: Ghostly EMF signature; phase-sense altered physiology.
sheet.enhancements:
Cannot be surprised while conscious.
Advantage on saves against Shaken, Frightened, Dazed, and Charmed.
Once per encounter, reroll a failed save.
When using Steady On or Second Wind, gain temporary HP equal to WIS.
Can maintain phased state without it ending when attacking or using powers; attacks and powers work normally while selectively solid at the point of contact.
sheet.limitationsText:
Solid Ground Required.
Phasing passes through the living world but not through beings, objects, obstacles, or barriers in Limbo/Purgatory. Physical attacks and damage from phased beings or Limbo/Purgatory sources affect Wraith normally while phased.
